notes: Removed the boot-time LED self-test screen; unified every hint line on the OLED to one style (click X hold Y) and fixed a real bug where the Status screen's device ID line rendered below the visible area in LoRa TX mode; web panel and WiFi Setup's own OSC fields are now bilingual (RU/EN toggle, remembers your choice) - OLED stays English until it has a Cyrillic-capable font
